summary: Full frontend E2E testing of new Galería module on https://estudio-panel.preview.emergentagent.com/galeria. All 7 requested flows executed via Playwright using data-testid selectors and ALL passed: albums grid (3 seed albums), album-detail navigation, default photo selection, usages list vs unused state, edit-and-persist photo metadata, delete enabled only for unused photos, file upload via 'Añadir foto' adds a tile, album rename, album delete with confirm dialog returning to /galeria, album create -> direct navigation to empty detail, sidebar Galería link, back button, and topbar theme toggle (light->dark) with no layout breakage.

issues: Subtitle 'Agrupa tus fotos en álbumes para mostrarlas en tu web.' is duplicated: once in the Topbar (under the 'Galería' title) and again in the page body under 'Álbumes (N)'. Recommend removing one to avoid redundancy.

action_items: Optional: de-duplicate the 'Agrupa tus fotos en álbumes...' subtitle between Topbar and the Álbumes page body.
critical_code_review_comments: AlbumDetalle.tsx: global selectedPhotoId is shared across albums; when navigating from one album to another it could fall back to the first photo, which works but may surprise users. Consider scoping selection per album.
AlbumDetalle.tsx: URL.createObjectURL is never revoked when photos are removed; in a long session this leaks memory. Call URL.revokeObjectURL on remove/unmount for blob URLs.

PhotoDetail uses local state initialized from props; rendering relies on key={selected.id} in parent to reset edit state — this is correct but fragile. A useEffect resetting state on photo.id change would be more explicit.
AlbumDetalle.tsx is ~422 lines and mixes PhotoTile, PhotoDetail and AlbumDetallePage; could be split into smaller files for maintainability (still under 700-line threshold).
All other code-review checks pass: data-testid coverage is excellent, no console errors during the run, no MongoDB/_id issues (frontend-only), env vars not applicable.
seed_data_creation: None persisted (in-memory Zustand). During the test the seed album 'Esculturas de hierro' was renamed to 'TEST Renombrado Hierro' and gp-3 was deleted; these mutations are in-memory only and reset on page reload.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Galería module is solid: all data-testids work (album-create-btn, album-create-dialog, album-title-input, album-create-confirm, album-card-<id>, page-album-detalle, album-photos-grid, gphoto-detail, gphoto-tile-<id>, gphoto-usage-row-<i>, gphoto-unused, gphoto-edit-name, gphoto-edit-alt, gphoto-save, gphoto-delete (correctly disabled when usages>0), album-rename-btn/title/desc/save, album-add-photo (hidden file input), album-delete-btn/dialog/confirm, album-back-btn). Theme toggle data-testid is 'theme-toggle'. The only feedback is a duplicated subtitle in the header and a minor memory-leak risk with non-revoked blob URLs.
rca of the issue: No issues found; nothing to RCA.
